name: Closed-month immutability: UPDATE and DELETE blocked while month closed
method: Close the month for the target sortie via monthly_report_close_close, then attempt UPDATE and DELETE. Both must error. Reopen for cleanup.

observed.update_error: SQL 400: {"message":"Failed to run sql query: ERROR:  P0001: Cannot modify sortie — month is closed for this squadron. Re-open via super_admin only.\nCONTEXT:  PL/pgSQL function _sortie_closed_month_guard() line 30 at RAISE\n"}
observed.delete_error: SQL 400: {"message":"Failed to run sql query: ERROR:  P0001: Cannot delete sortie dated 2026-02-24  — month 2026-02 is closed for this squadron. Re-open via super_admin only.\nCONTEXT:  PL/pgSQL function _sortie_closed_month_guard() line 37 at RAISE\n"}
